title: taraxacum dentosum
intro: Taraxacum dentosum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its bright yellow flowers and jagged leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum dentosum are said to include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Taraxacum dentosum is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be consumed raw in salads or as a juice, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
